location: On a corpse at the bottom floor of the tower with the broken spiral staircase, in the northwestern part of Belurat, Tower Settlement — guarded by two giant Spider-Scorpions.
region: Land of Shadow — Belurat, Tower Settlement (Shadow of the Erdtree DLC; NOT a base-game region — see _verify note)

source.name: Corpse in Belurat, Tower Settlement (guarded by 2 Spider-Scorpions)

tactics: From the Belurat, Tower Settlement Site of Grace, head left and ride the elevator shortcut up, then go left again to enter the base of the spiral staircase tower.
The bow sits at the bottom of that tower, defended by two large Spider-Scorpions — they poison on hit and are faster than they look, so fight them one at a time if you can bait them apart.
This is Shadow of the Erdtree DLC content reachable only after entering the Land of Shadow via the Mohgwyn Palace altar — there is no base-game copy of this weapon.
lore: Roughly carved from bone by the tower's Hornsent inhabitants, this shortbow served as a conduit for calling on vengeful spirits — a relic of the settlement's ancient hexing traditions.

builds.name: Status/bleed archer
builds.why: Rancor Shot rapid-fires tracking arrows, good for stacking status-effect arrows onto a moving target from range.

builds.name: Cheap secondary ranged tool
builds.why: E/E scaling and low 8 Str/11 Dex requirement make it an easy pickup for any build wanting a pull/poke option.
